content:
Here are two suggestions:
First, please increase the mileage benefits for purchasing prime. The current cap significantly limits buyers’ purchasing power. I recommend adding at least five times more tiers so users can gain more benefits and feel encouraged to buy more.
Second, please develop more package options that can be purchased with prime. The current weekly and monthly packages are not attractive at all. You should offer more appealing and tempting packages—those will motivate players to stay engaged and continue playing the game.
